name: percus-review
description: Review cross-provider Percus + skills/hooks Fase 6. Pre-commit defesa em profundidade (5 hooks regex/AST): pre-commit-check (R11 review fresco), mock-scan (R3 placeholders), auth-import (R7 Supabase/GoTrue/NextAuth vetado), migration-check (R6 schema sem migration), types-check (R5 mypy strict + tsc). Skills: feature-flow (R1 CRUD gate), close-milestone, catalog-publish, pages-scan, cookie-audit (R7 subset httpOnly/Secure/SameSite). Hook on-stop auto-dispara catalog-publish quando catalog-info.yaml muda. Git hook nativo via /percus-review:install-git-hooks (Layer 2). Auto-trigger review pelo agente via wrappers kit-level.
